info.title: Mintlify Admin API v2
info.description: Version 2 of the Mintlify Admin API for agent job management with fire-and-forget job creation and polling-based status retrieval.

post.description: Creates a new agent job that runs in the background and returns immediately with the job ID. Use the get endpoint to poll for status and retrieve the PR link once created.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Your project ID. Can be copied from the [API keys](https://dashboard.mintlify.com/settings/organization/api-keys) page in your dashboard.

prompt.description: The task instructions for the agent to execute.

201.description: Agent job created successfully. The job runs in the background.

error.example: Too many sessions created. Please try again later.

get.description: Retrieves the current status and details of a specific agent job. Use this endpoint to poll for completion and retrieve the PR link once the agent creates one.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Your project ID. Can be copied from the [API keys](https://dashboard.mintlify.com/settings/organization/api-keys) page in your dashboard.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the agent job to retrieve.

post.description: Sends an additional message to an existing agent job session. The agent processes the message in the background.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Your project ID. Can be copied from the [API keys](https://dashboard.mintlify.com/settings/organization/api-keys) page in your dashboard.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the agent job to send a message to.

prompt.description: The message content to send to the agent.

200.description: Message sent successfully. The agent processes it in the background.

id.description: Unique identifier for the agent job.

status.description: Current status of the agent job.

repository.description: Full URL of the GitHub repository.

ref.description: Git branch name where changes are being made.

model.description: The AI model used for this job.

prLink.description: URL of the pull request created by the agent. Null until the PR is created.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the job was created.

archivedAt.description: Timestamp when the job was archived. Null if still active.

error.description: Error message describing what went wrong.

details.description: Additional error details for validation errors.

bearerAuth.description: The Authorization header expects a Bearer token. Use an admin API key (prefixed with `mint_`). This is a server-side secret key. Generate one on the [API keys page](https://dashboard.mintlify.com/settings/organization/api-keys) in your dashboard.
